description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm ironIf social networking is an all-integral part of your life, then flaunt it in style with this tantra t-shirt.
